products.name: Raw Sidr Honey
products.shortDescription: Raw, unfiltered honey harvested from Sidr blossoms.
products.description: Our Raw Sidr Honey is harvested from remote Sidr groves and left completely unfiltered to preserve its natural enzymes, pollen and rich amber colour. A spoonful a day is a tradition passed through generations.

products.name: Acacia Blossom Honey
products.shortDescription: Light, delicate honey from spring acacia blooms.
products.description: A lighter, milder honey pressed from spring acacia blossoms. Its delicate floral notes make it perfect for tea, breakfast tables and gifting.

products.name: Traditional Desi Ghee
products.shortDescription: Slow-churned desi ghee made the traditional way.
products.description: Made using the traditional bilona method, our desi ghee is slow-churned from cultured cream for a rich aroma and deep, golden colour. Free from preservatives and additives.

products.name: Desi Ghee — Family Jar
products.shortDescription: Everyday desi ghee jar for the family kitchen.
products.description: A convenient family-size jar of our traditionally churned desi ghee — the same purity, in a size made for everyday cooking.

products.name: Premium Ajwa Dates
products.shortDescription: Soft, dark Ajwa dates from Madinah.
products.description: Sourced directly from the orchards of Madinah, our Ajwa dates are soft, dark and deeply flavoured — cherished in Islamic tradition and prized for their quality.

products.name: Mabroom Dates
products.shortDescription: Long, chewy Mabroom dates with caramel notes.
products.description: Mabroom dates are known for their long shape, chewy texture and deep caramel sweetness — a favourite for daily enjoyment and gifting alike.

products.name: Ayat-ul-Kursi Wall Art
products.shortDescription: Elegant minimal calligraphy wall art in gold frame.
products.description: A minimal, modern take on Islamic wall art — Ayat-ul-Kursi rendered in elegant calligraphy with a fine gold frame, designed to bring quiet beauty to any room.

products.name: Premium Velvet Prayer Mat
products.shortDescription: Soft, cushioned velvet prayer mat in neutral tones.
products.description: Crafted from soft, cushioned velvet with a non-slip base, this prayer mat brings comfort and quiet elegance to daily prayer — in neutral, timeless tones.

products.name: Honey & Dates Gift Box
products.shortDescription: Curated gift box of raw honey and premium dates.
products.description: A beautifully packaged gift box pairing our Raw Sidr Honey with a selection of premium Ajwa dates — an elegant gift for Eid, weddings or simply saying thank you.

products.name: Complete Heaven Gift Set
products.shortDescription: Our full range in one premium gift set.
products.description: Our most generous offering — raw honey, traditional desi ghee and premium dates presented together in a keepsake box. A complete gesture of care.
